**Abdelkarim el Ghani** is a Research Assistant at the [**Erasmus University Rotterdam**](https://www.eur.nl/){target="_blank"}. His expertise lies in: - Statistical data analysis - Neuroscience - Open science practices He is highly skilled in [**R**](https://www.r-project.org/){target="_blank"} programming, data visualization, and managing large-scale research datasets. Abdelkarim has extensive experience in both academic and clinical research environments. He has: - Contributed to international conferences - Authored scientific publications - Supported open science initiatives by sharing code and workflows on platforms like the Open Science Framework ([**OSF**](https://osf.io/){target="\"_blank"}). His research interests include: - Neurodevelopment - Brain imaging - Statistical modeling of behavioral data Driven by a passion for data-driven problem-solving, Abdelkarim aims to advance reproducible and transparent scientific research.
